cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. I need to track each swap step by step. Let me start by listing the initial presents each person has: - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple present - Dave: yellow present - Eve: white present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one carefully. First swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. So Bob originally has the orange ball, and Eve has the white present. After swapping, Bob gets the white present, and Eve gets the orange ball. Let me update their presents: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Second swap: Bob and Claire swap their gifts. Currently, Bob has white, Claire has purple. After swapping, Bob gets purple, Claire gets white. Now: - Alice: brown - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Third swap: Dave and Alice swap their gifts. Dave has yellow, Alice has brown. After swapping, Dave gets brown, Alice gets yellow. - Alice: yellow - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: orange Fourth swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts again. Bob has purple, Eve has orange. After swapping, Bob gets orange, Eve gets purple. - Alice: yellow - Bob: orange - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Fifth swap: Alice and Bob swap their gifts.
